name: Tied by your Red
short_description: A girl who has been sold, is about to start her new life with the notorious Duke in this horrible mansion. She has to tiptoe through the daily fearful routine of being beheaded if she utters a wrong word!? A Lily story, corny and sweet Beauty and the Beast Yuri show is about to begin.
detailed_description:
Story:

A dark mansion, a dull room, and the maze-like corridors…

Every midnight, “something” in the mansion strikes!

But–

None of it matters!

Erica, a girl who has been sold, is about to start her new life with the notorious Duke in this horrible mansion.

Facing the completely incomprehensible Duke, she has to tiptoe through the daily fearful routine of being beheaded if she utters a wrong word!?

The scared-to-death girl x The stony-faced woman dressed as a man, a corny and sweet Beauty and the Beast Yuri story is coming soon.

Character:

Erica：

The protagonist, who is sold by her parents to the Duke. She thinks fortune favors her, and her goal is to stay alive.

Louise：

Rumor has it that the Duke is a creature of terror. But in fact, she’s a beauty disguised as a man, her expressionless face is because she rarely comes into contact with people.

Maiden:

A suspicious maid who holds an unspecified grudge against Erica.

GamePlay:

Players will view the story from Erika’s perspective, and progress through one choice after another to reach the ending.

There is only one route with three endings. After clearing one round, you can enjoy the story from other characters’ point of view.

PS.

*This game depicts minor (really, really little) violence and gore.

*This game contains a little bit of explicit depiction and eroticism, but there are no pornographic or indescribable scenes! No worries!


About us：

“Tied by your Red” is Yurif's second completed project, and we are experimenting with different expression styles.

We hope you all enjoy this tiny pink cheesy romance drama wrapped in a horror game skin.
